title: SQL: cast interval to time results in zero time
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_intervals (id INTEGER IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, duration INTERVAL NOT NULL);
SELECT duration, CAST(duration AS TIME) FROM test_intervals;
SELECT id, CAST(duration AS TIME) AS time_value FROM test_intervals WHERE duration IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, CAST(INTERVAL '120' SECOND AS TIME) AS time_value FROM test_intervals;
key_bug_features: casting interval to time returns zero time
